message:
feat(entropy): add operational telemetry counters to EntropyScheduler [ft-3kxe.18]

Add EntropySchedulerTelemetry/Snapshot with 7 plain u64 counters tracking pane
registrations, unique adds, unregistrations, byte feeds, total bytes fed,
schedule computations, and warmup completions. Wire counters into register_pane(),
unregister_pane(), feed_bytes(), feed_byte(), and schedule(). Add 13 proptest
counter invariant tests. All 44 proptest + 43 unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
